title: koeleria cristata var. densiflora
intro: Koeleria cristata var. densiflora, also known as hard fescue or curly grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits associated with Koeleria cristata var. densiflora include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Koeleria cristata var. densiflora typically involve drying the plant material and making teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
